description: Fleet policy (SHA pinning, immutable Action digests, cooldown, automerge) is inherited from the self-hosted Renovate admin config (rknightion/renovate-config config.js) via autodiscover. Only the repo-specific GoReleaser-version tracker lives here.

customManagers.description: Track the GoReleaser CLI version pinned as the binaries.yml goreleaser-version input default.
